name: Stickman Samurai Katana
description: ⚔️⚔️⚔️ Stickman Katana - The spectacular return in Stickman games series toppled the international game market. The followers of Stickman games still have not forgotten the feeling of tight guillotine and ecstatic graphics of Stickman Legend old version. And what would you expect in a recent version of Stickman fight and this revenge? Whether this revenge will end or not? Stickman Katana will come back with a new look, new Stickman characters, new Stickman skills, new stick pets. Be ready to wipe out the enemy – cruel monster and their obstacles by unprecedented features in Stickman Revenge Stick War deserves as one of the best stickman games worth playing ever.
instructions: Stick War deserves as one of the best stickman games worth playing ever
